steps.title: Substitute y from first equation into second equation
steps.content: Replace y in the second equation using the expression from the first equation: $$2(3x - 4) = 5x$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Expand and simplify: $$6x - 8 = 5x$$ $$x = 8$$
Now substitute $x = 8$ into the first equation.
